responsibilities: retry within session (max 1 retry per v1 rule)
run_session.invoked_via: subprocess only (no direct import from queue or scheduler)

responsibilities: concurrency control (parallel / serial judgement per deploy_risk)
routing (next state decision from run_session result)
queue_engine.invoked_via: direct import from scheduler, invokes run_session via subprocess.run

boundary_rules: scheduler must not import run_session directly
queue engine must not import run_session directly
queue engine must invoke run_session only via subprocess
scheduler may invoke queue engine via direct import (same process)
scheduler must use only QueueEngine public API (no private members)

open_issues.title: queue_policy DSL full evaluation not implemented
open_issues.description: dispatch_ready handles only deploy_risk==critical → BLOCKED_HUMAN. Other DSL conditions (e.g., waiting_human.db_touch_allowed) are not yet evaluated.

open_issues.title: failure_type extraction relies on subprocess stdout
open_issues.description: QueueEngine assumes run_session writes failure_type to stdout as JSON. In production, reading artifacts/report.json may be needed.

open_issues.title: queue priority not implemented
open_issues.description: Multiple READY items are picked by created_at / id order. Priority queue design is deferred.

open_issues.title: force_plan_id is internal API not formally documented as public
open_issues.description: scheduler CronRunner.tick(force_plan_id=...) is used to bypass time matching for --plan-id CLI. Formal public API status should be decided in P7.

operational_backlog.title: Cursor commit omission prevention
operational_backlog.description: session-137 and session-138 both had untracked artifacts after Cursor implementation. Need Cursor prompt improvement or Hooks-based commit enforcement.
operational_backlog.proposed_handling: address in P7 via Claude Code Hooks

operational_backlog.title: Add explicit spec_missing case to scheduler test
operational_backlog.description: test_queue_engine_blocks_human_gate_conditions currently lacks an explicit spec_missing test case.

scheduler_responsibility_locked: scheduler determines WHEN and WHAT to enqueue only
routing / retry / failure handling belongs to queue engine
time evaluation is JST with ISO weekday 1-7

final_judgement.reason: P6A through P6D all reached completed status with main-tracked artifacts, verification gates pass on main, responsibility separation is documented, open issues are classified, and P7 input conditions are locked.
